description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can with a vibrant red exterior, prominently featuring the iconic Coca-Cola branding in white script. The can displays a detailed image of a classic glass Coca-Cola bottle with visible condensation droplets, enhancing its realistic and refreshing appearance. The top of the can is metallic with a standard pull-tab opening, typical of beverage cans. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving the can a sleek look. There are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of wear, and the can appears to be unopened. The overall design is clean, with the branding and imagery wrapping around the can's body.
description: A red, glossy Coca-Cola can with white branding and a detailed image of a glass bottle, featuring a metallic pull-tab top.
description_view_0: The can shows the Coca-Cola logo partially and a large image of a glass bottle with condensation.
description_view_1: This view centers the full Coca-Cola script logo in white on the red background, with no bottle image visible.
description_view_2: The can is turned so that only a partial logo and a sliver of the bottle image are visible.
description_view_3: The glass bottle image is most prominent here, with the Coca-Cola logo on the bottle label clearly visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola script logo and a detailed image of a glass Coca-Cola bottle with visible branding, both on a red background.
